sections.heading: Global university internships
sections.content:
At Microsoft, our interns work on projects that matter – and your team will rely on your skills and insights to help deliver those projects to market. This is your chance to bring your solutions and ideas to life while working on cutting-edge technology. We offer internships in all job families and solution areas, and it’s open to current students in Bachelor’s, Master’s, MBA, PhD programs.
Discovery program
The Discovery Program is a unique opportunity for students who are passionate about technology and want to make a positive impact on the world and society. This four-week internship is open to rising first-year students college students, based in Redmond, Washington or Atlanta, Georgia. Participants will work on a real project, learn from Microsoft employees and mentors, and explore different career paths in tech.
Explore program
Explore Microsoft is a summer internship program specifically designed for first- and/or second-year college students. Gain experience in software development through a learning program where you get the opportunity to work in a pod alongside other Explore Interns.

sections.heading: PhD, MBA, JD internships
sections.content: If you're pursuing a PhD, MBA, or JD and want to explore what it's like to work at Microsoft, look no further. We host PhD, MBA, and JD interns throughout our teams. Our PhD, MBA, and JD interns are active, contributing members to our  community. No matter what route you take, come work on meaningful, innovative projects that add to our company's success.

sections.heading: Corporate, External, and Legal Affairs (CELA) internships
sections.content:
The Microsoft Legal Intern Program is an extraordinary opportunity for aspiring legal professionals to cultivate their careers within one of the world's leading technology companies.
Rotation programs
HR Rotation
Finance Rotation
Cloud Supply Chain Rotation
Our HR rotation program is a 3-year program that fosters learning and growth in the HR profession and helps you jumpstart your career.
https://careers.microsoft.com/v2/global/en/hrrotation
Learn more about the HR2P program
Our Microsoft Finance Rotation Program (FRP) is a two-year program comprised of four, 6-month rotations, split across core finance functions. Kick-start your career in finance with a rotation in corporate functions, production/engineering finance, sales finance and more.
https://careers.microsoft.com/v2/global/en/financerotation
Learn more about the finance rotation program
SCORE is a three-year career experience designed to provide emerging talent with an unparalleled journey through end-to-end cloud supply chain operations. Over three one-year rotations, participants will partner with and learn from our teams while building skills and supply chain acumen to accelerate their career growth.
https://careers.microsoft.com/v2/global/en/score.html
Learn more about the supply chain rotation program
HR Rotation

Datacenter pathways
HaaS datacenter pathways
Datacenters are the backbone of modern technology—massive warehouses filled with thousands of interconnected servers, running 24/7. Behind it all are our Datacenter Operations teams, made up of individuals from diverse backgrounds, like you, ensuring everything stays operational. It’s routine work with a remarkable impact.
Learn more about our Datacenter Pathways
Microsoft Datacenter Academy
The Datacenter Academy empowers individuals to thrive in cloud computing, IT, and critical environments. This initiative offers a comprehensive pathway to employment in these rapidly expanding fields, providing skills for the future of technology.
Learn more about the Microsoft Datacenter Academy

sections.heading: Students and graduates
sections.content:
Gain new skills and find what you love — with programs designed for those early in their careers.
Our hiring programs
Your career starts here
Lasting connections
Set your career in motion through mentorship programs, networking opportunities and chances to connect with colleagues dedicated to your success.
Growth opportunities
Our internships and early career programs are designed with your professional growth in mind. Get the experiences and resources needed to pursue your passions.
Community impact
Contribute to meaningful projects and gain significant experiences as we work toward strengthening the communities where we live and work.
Early career programs
Explore a wide range of roles that fit your goals and background.
School programs and apprenticeships
From week-long experiences to full-time roles, these opportunities are made for high school students looking to gain insight into our firm and industry.

sections.heading: Pre-internship events range from one day to a few weeks and are meant for college freshman, sophomores and juniors, as well as MBA students.
Internships
sections.content:
Find a summer internship that lets you work with us during your time off. These opportunities last from 10 to 12 weeks and are offered to undergraduate students in their next-to-last year. Postgraduate and PhD-level internships are also offered.
Our full-time programs are available to undergraduate, postgraduate, PhD- and MBA-level candidates and run from 24 to 36 months, depending on the role.
See where tech can take you

sections.content:

From graduate to vice president, Shree Aggarwal’s passion for coding shines at J.P. Morgan.
Global Nomad: Building an Online Community for Young People Around the World
Want to build an app to connect young people around the world? Start by asking young programmers what they'd want to see...and how they'd build it!
Work with us
You’ll find a variety of career paths and opportunities to learn and grow. We’re committed to supporting our employees and helping them succeed every step of the way.
View Transcript
Audio Descriptive
When you picture the future of work, what do you see? We see you… at a company that meets you where you are and supports you with what you need to grow. Where you discover new passions and learn skills that help you pursue them. We see you exploring a world of opportunities and finding your next big career move just down the hall. At JPMorganChase, we believe the future of work is a career that grows with you.

sections.heading: Early Careers | Students & Recent Graduates | BCG Careers
sections.content:
Early Careers
At Boston Consulting Group (BCG), you'll find more than a job - you'll discover a place where your talents are nurtured and your impact valued. By joining BCG early in your career, you'll gain experience and skills that will bring you success beyond your expectations.
skip this widget
Not sure which role is right for you?
Take our career quiz to discover your ideal role.
➜ TAKE THE QUIZ
Experience what it’s like to work at BCG with our virtual job simulations.
A sense of mutual respect and mindfulness permeates our culture-in fact, it’s the key to our success.
Answering your frequently asked questions
Does BCG visit college/university campuses?
Yes, BCG actively recruits at colleges and universities worldwide. Our team may soon be near you, offering insights into BCG and our career opportunities.
Find out if BCG is present on a campus near you.

sections.heading: Does BCG offer consulting internships?
sections.content: Yes, internships are a common pathway into full-time consulting careers at BCG. Join us as an intern and immerse yourself in real consulting work. Mentored by our experienced consultants, you’ll take on meaningful projects, interact with our clients, and get a comprehensive view of life at BCG. Internship durations vary by role and location, typically ranging from a few weeks to a year. Explore our

sections.heading: internship opportunities
sections.content:
to learn more.
What other opportunities does BCG offer beyond consulting?
We offer a variety of careers outside of consulting, including data science and analytics, product management, business operations, finance and more! Get to know our teams better by exploring the ‘teams’ section of our navigation.
A sense of mutual respect and mindfulness permeates our culture-in fact, it's the key to our success.
Why start your career at BCG?
Access unparalleled learning opportunities.
We prioritize your growth by offering extensive learning opportunities to expand your consulting skills and business insight. Through structured training, top-notch coaching, and on-the-job learning, you’ll build a toolkit for future success.
Learn more about career growth at BCG.
Collaborate with the brightest
At the heart of our success is an emphasis on teamwork. You’ll collaborate with diverse, curious, and dedicated colleagues, creating a supportive community that enhances client solutions and helps you thrive.
Learn more about our culture.
Challenge yourself with a variety of experiences.
You’ll work across diverse industries, partnering with a vast array of clients, from multinationals and NGOs to tech startups. This offers a steep learning curve, sharpening your skills and enabling impactful contributions from day one.
Learn more about working at BCG.
A sense of mutual respect and mindfulness permeates our culture-in fact, it’s the key to our success.
